_meta.note: Push this file with '[skip ci]' in the commit message to update editorial data without a session, SW bump, or CI pipeline. The relay caches for 300s; the app sees changes within 5 minutes.

game_overlays.matchupNote: MTL stunned CAR 6-2 in G1 (Slafkovsky 2G 1A) — first CAR loss of playoffs, ending bid for perfect 16-0. G2 Saturday at Lenovo Center, 7pm ET, TNT/truTV/Max.
Knicks look for a 3-0 stranglehold at Rocket Mortgage FieldHouse. A CLE loss ends their comeback bid.
EFL Championship Playoff Final at Wembley. Middlesbrough vs Hull City — £270m Premier League prize. Paramount+ (US) · Sky Sports (UK).
